# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

# Base Image
FROM node:latest

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Install system utilities
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    vim \
    git \
    unzip \
    wget

# Install build tools
RUN apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    python

# Install Node.js
RUN curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_14.x | bash -
RUN apt-get install -y nodejs

# Install other dependencies
RUN apt-get install -y \
    libssl-dev \
    libffi-dev \
    libxml2-dev \
    libxslt1-dev \
    zlib1g-dev \
    libsasl2-dev \
    libldap2-dev

# Copy package.json and package-lock.json
COPY package*.json ./

# Install app dependencies
RUN npm install

# Bundle app source
COPY . .

# Expose port
EXPOSE 8080

# Start the app
CMD [ "npm", "start" ]
